chart_title: Synthetic #3 — grouped bars, asymmetric error bars
notes: 3-series x 5-group grouped bar chart with asymmetric upper/lower error caps on every bar. Legend at top-left inside plot area, three rows: Baseline, Tuned, Tuned+JIT. Plot frame is a closed rectangle; horizontal gridlines at every major y-tick (0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100). Series colors match matplotlib's default tab10 cycle (C0/C1/C2). Each bar is ~33 px wide; bar centers per group at (group_tick + series_offset) where Baseline offset = -34 px, Tuned = 0, Tuned+JIT = +34 px relative to the group's x-tick column.
